name: National Grid plc
description: National Grid plc is a British multinational electricity and gas utility company headquartered in London, England. The company is primarily engaged in the transmission and distribution of electricity and natural gas. Its operations are focused on Great Britain, where it owns and operates critical transmission networks, and in the Northeastern United States, where it serves millions of customers. National Grid plays a vital role in the energy infrastructure, facilitating the transition to a cleaner, more sustainable energy future through significant investments in grid upgrades, interconnectors, and renewable energy integration.
